title: Quiz pack (round-N.json)
description: Schema for the on-disk quiz packs loaded by Adept-Game's session service. Documents both legacy fields (text/answerText/URLs, splash, header) and the new card-plugin fields (cardKind / cardKinds / cardParams). When new card plugins ship with validateParams schemas, the union under `definitions.QuestionCell.properties.cardParams` should be regenerated at boot from pluginRegistry.listCardKinds() — see requirements/plugin.md §10.

items.description: Theme label rendered on the left edge of a round row.

themeIcons.description: Optional per-row icon URL. When present, length must match `themes`. Use `null` for any row that should fall back to the auto-generated initial icon.

questions.description: Outer array indexed by theme row; inner array indexed by points column (left → right). All rows must have equal length.

text.description: Question text. May be empty when a question media URL alone is sufficient.

questionUrl.description: Optional media URL shown alongside the question.

answerText.description: Answer text shown after the host reveals.

answerUrl.description: Optional media URL shown alongside the answer.

splashUrl.description: Optional intro splash media URL shown before the question.

splashVariant.description: Visual transition variant for the splash overlay.

splashAudioUrl.description: Optional audio URL played alongside the splash.

splashDismissHostOnly.description: When true, only the host can dismiss the splash overlay.

headerUrl.description: Optional header decoration URL (the inset bonus image).

cardKind.description: Legacy single-kind form accepted on disk. The loader normalizes it to `cardKinds: [cardKind]`. Prefer `cardKinds` for new content. Value must match a `cardKind` registered by a server-side plugin.

cardKinds.description: Card-plugin kinds attached to this cell, in declared order. Each entry must match a `cardKind` registered by a server-side plugin. Conflict rules (enforced at pack load and on host_edit_quiz_question): at most one `replace_field` kind, at most one `replace_card` kind, no `replace_field` + `replace_card` mix.

cardParams.description: Per-kind handler parameters. Canonical form is `Record<cardKind, object>`; the loader also accepts a single object when exactly one cardKind is declared, normalizing to the record form internally. Each kind's slot is validated by the plugin's `validateParams` hook at load time. For strict key validation against registered plugins, see `definitions.RegisteredCardParamsMap` (regenerated via `npm run gen:quiz-schema` in `backend/`).

anyOf.description: If both legacy and canonical forms are present, they must agree (host edit always writes the canonical form).

RegisteredCardParamsMap.description: No card plugins registered at host boot — any object accepted. After registering card kinds, run `npm run gen:quiz-schema` in `backend/`.
